text: 买好几天的量 两三天的吧

text: Need me to carry anything heavy back.

text: 相当于我还有两天时间 肯定补不完

平时都是状态好补三天状态不好补一天甚至不补
再怎么补也要一个星期
一个星期补了又新上一个星期的课了

text: You're not trying to finish all of them before the 3rd though, right

text: New ones come, old ones get chipped away slowly. It's not a race with a finish line

rawContent: New ones come, old ones get chipped away slowly. It's not a race with a finish line || 新的来旧的慢慢啃 又不是有终点线的比赛

rawContent: 后面我觉得只要跟上进度能拿奖就好
